assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 25 shows 'Upstream Affected Component | customfield_10632 | axios'. overlap-check.md line 5 confirms 'customfield_10632 -- configured and populated with value axios', line 13 extracts the value, and lines 17-19 show the JQL query 'cf[10632] ~ axios' used to search for related CVE Jiras.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 29-33 explicitly show filtering TC-8008: 'PS Component match: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui == pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- match' and 'Stream match: rhtpa-2.2 == rhtpa-2.2 -- match'. Lines 6-7 confirm the field IDs customfield_10669 and customfield_10832.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 38-44: 'Inspecting TC-8008's issuelinks array for linked remediation Tasks (link type Depend): TC-8009 (link type: Depend)' with summary 'Bump axios to 1.9.0 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 48-55 show a comparison table: 'Current CVE (TC-8010) fix threshold >= 1.8.2', 'Existing remediation task (TC-8009) bump version 1.9.0', 'Comparison 1.9.0 >= 1.8.2', 'Result: Covering remediation exists -- TC-8009 already covers this CVE'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Decision: Close -- Covered by Existing Remediation'. Line 5: 'No new remediation task is needed.' Line 79: 'Step 8 -- Remediation | Skipped | No new tasks needed -- existing TC-8009 covers this CVE fix threshold'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Related link between the current CVE (TC-8010) and the related CVE (TC-8008) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 63-65: 'Related link: TC-8010 <-> TC-8008 (same upstream component -- axios)', 'Check existing links on TC-8010: no existing links found', 'Action: Create Related link between TC-8010 and TC-8008'. The idempotency check is explicitly performed before creating. data-extraction.md line 54 corroborates: 'No existing issue links on TC-8010'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Depend link from the covering remediation task (TC-8009) to the current CVE (TC-8010) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 67-69: 'Depend link: TC-8010 -> TC-8009 (covering remediation)', 'Check existing links on TC-8010: no existing links found', 'Action: Create Depend link from TC-8010 to TC-8009'. The Depend relationship between TC-8010 and TC-8009 is established with an idempotency check before creation. The link direction TC-8010 depends on TC-8009 is semantically equivalent to TC-8009 covering TC-8010.

assertion_results.text: A comment is posted on the current CVE documenting the cross-CVE overlap finding — including the related CVE key (TC-8008), covering task key (TC-8009), library (axios), bump version (1.9.0), and fix threshold (1.8.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 73-84 show the comment to post on TC-8010 containing all required elements: TC-8008 (related CVE key), TC-8009 (covering task key), 'axios' (library), '1.9.0' (bump version), '1.8.2' (fix threshold). The comment text reads: 'Cross-CVE overlap: existing remediation task TC-8009 (from CVE-2026-42035 / TC-8008) already bumps axios to 1.9.0, which meets or exceeds this CVE fix threshold (1.8.2).' triage-outcome.md lines 39-41 confirm the comment action.
